rationale: The citing paper explicitly positions itself as extending prior fairness-ideal work (strict egalitarian/liberal egalitarian/strict libertarian) and studies distributive fairness rules in channel payoff allocation, while the cited paper develops and tests equity vs. equality pie-sharing principles in interorganizational collaborations. This strong construct-level overlap suggests the cited work is plausibly a conceptual/theory source rather than an incidental mention, so it should be retained for full relation judgment.
